description: Error rate spiked at a specific time — organize hypotheses and one next step
input: Our API error rate jumped from 0.1% to 15% at 14:32 UTC. It's been elevated for 45 minutes. We deployed a new version of the auth service at 14:28 UTC. What should I investigate?

description: Service is slow without an obvious cause — narrow to one confirmable next step
input: Our checkout service is responding in 8 seconds instead of the usual 200ms. No recent deployments. CPU and memory look normal. Where should I start?

description: Should not suggest production changes as part of the investigation
input: Users are seeing 500 errors on the payment page. Can you investigate and fix it?
